# New York SHIELD Act

Jurisdiction: United States - New York
Region: US-NY
Citation: Stop Hacks and Improve Electronic Data Security Act
Authority: New York State Senate
Source URL: https://www.nysenate.gov/legislation/laws/GBS/899-BB
Topics: security_breach, accountability, processor_contracts
Keywords: SHIELD Act, New York data security, reasonable safeguards, private information

## Summary
New York data security law requiring reasonable administrative, technical, and physical safeguards for private information.

## Key compliance obligations
- Maintain reasonable security safeguards.
- Assess vendors and service providers.
- Coordinate with New York breach-notification obligations.
